trivia_bullets.text: First printing, no reprints. Red common from ELD; thematically connected to the untamed Wilds of Eldraine and to Garenbrig's beast-and-forest identity, though no explicit court alignment in card text.

Flavor text: 'Build a moat. If we're lucky, it can't swim.' —Syr Branigan, knight of Ardenvale. Syr Branigan is flavor-text-only (no legendary creature card in ELD). Comic understatement from an Ardenvale knight; illustrates ELD's tonal range from high-chivalric drama to dark comedy.
Typed as Wolverine — one of the few standalone Wolverine creature types in Magic's history rather than the more common Beast subtype categorization for mustelid-style creatures.
Second-card-drawn trigger gives +1/+1 and first strike. Aligns with ELD's red card-draw subtheme (Irencrag Pyromancer, Improbable Alliance). EDHREC rank 28,075 — deep common.

related_cards.name: Irencrag Pyromancer
related_cards.note: Red ELD creature with 'second card drawn' trigger; same design subtheme

related_cards.name: Improbable Alliance
related_cards.note: Token-creation on second draw; same subtheme
